name: codex-orchestration
description: Route GPT-5.6 subagents, compose bounded assignments, and integrate verified results without letting the root agent implement.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate bounded work to the right GPT-5.6 subagents
interface.longDescription: A configurable control-plane workflow for Codex. The root agent decomposes and supervises work while specialized Luna, Terra, and Sol agents explore, implement, review, and verify bounded deliverables, including large programmatic fan-out through an adaptive queue.
defaultPrompt: Orchestrate this task with bounded GPT-5.6 subagents and verify the integrated result
